_notes: Central hot-editable economy balance table (task 14, FR-14-4). Stealth-favored: clean runs stack the bonus_* multipliers and keep Heat ~0 (low catch chance); going loud gives only a modest heat_multiplier_slope payout bump but a steep catch_per_heat. Per-item cost tables (loot/gear/attr/perk/intel) live in their .tres and are range-checked by EconomyValidator. Unknown keys like this one are ignored by ContentRegistry._hydrate.
